title: Epitaph On General Gordon
content:
Warrior of God, man�s friend, and tyrant�s foe,
Now somewhere dead far in the waste Soudan,
Thou livest in all hearts, for all men know
This earth has never borne a nobler man.
meaning:
Alfred Lord Tennyson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epitaph On General Gordon"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
